01 — Executive Summary

Turn Every Lead into a Conversation

Most roofing and construction businesses lose leads not because of price, but because of slow follow-up and inconsistent communication. When a prospect submits a quote request, they typically hear back in hours or days. By then, a competitor who responded within minutes has already built trust.

SalesAI solves this by deploying a fully autonomous AI sales agent the moment a lead enters your system. It engages prospects over WhatsApp and email, qualifies their intent through natural conversation, answers product questions using your own knowledge base, and books meetings — all without manual intervention.

The result: roofing businesses using SalesAI report a 35–50% reduction in lead response time, a 28% uplift in quote acceptance rates, and sales reps who spend their time on hot, pre-qualified meetings rather than cold follow-ups.

⚡

Instant AI Engagement

AI responds to every new lead within 60 seconds, 24/7 — so no prospect ever falls through the cracks.

🎯

Smart Lead Scoring

Every conversation is scored 0–100 in real time. Green leads get accelerated to your reps. Red leads get nurtured automatically.

🔁

Automated Workflows

Visual workflow builder lets you define multi-step sequences triggered by lead events — without writing code.

📊

Full-funnel Analytics

Track leads from first contact to closed deal. Understand which channels, messages, and reps perform best.

02 — Platform Walkthrough

The Command Centre

Every sales manager starts their day on the SalesAI dashboard. It surfaces the four most important business metrics — total leads, AI engagement quality, meetings booked, and AI activity — alongside a stage funnel, interest score distribution, and weekly lead volume trend.

Total Leads

Aggregate count of all leads in the system with month-on-month comparison.

Green Engagement Rate

Percentage of leads the AI has moved into the "green" (high-intent) tier.

Meetings (30d)

Meetings booked by the AI in the last 30 days, including no-shows and completions.

Lead Management

The lead directory gives your team a full view of every prospect in your pipeline. Quickly filter by interest tier, search by name or company, and click through to the full lead detail — including AI-generated summaries and conversation history.

The individual lead detail page surfaces the AI’s analysis alongside actionable controls:

  • AI Summary — a one-paragraph synthesis of the lead’s intent, timeline, and key concerns
  • Sentiment indicator — positive, neutral, or negative based on message tone
  • Main objection — the top friction point identified by the AI
  • Stage controls — move the lead through 7 pipeline stages with a single click
  • AI mode toggle — hand off to human rep or re-activate AI at any time

Adding Leads

Leads enter SalesAI through three paths: manual entry via the new lead form, bulk CSV import, or automatic ingestion through the API (from your website form, CRM, or ad platform).

AI-Powered Conversations

The conversations module is where the AI does its work. Every inbound message is received here, an AI response is generated from your knowledge base, and the conversation is scored in real time. Your reps can review, intervene, or hand back control at any point.

Human in the loop: AI mode can be toggled per conversation with one click. When a rep takes over, the AI pauses. When they activate AI again, it picks up the thread seamlessly — with full context of everything said before.

03 — End-to-End Lead Workflow

From First Touch to Closed Deal

SalesAI orchestrates the full sales lifecycle. Here is the default workflow for a new roofing lead — from the moment they submit a quote request to the point your rep sits down with a pre-qualified, meeting-ready prospect.

Trigger-based activation

Workflows fire automatically on: lead imported, score drop, meeting booked, quote declined, or inbound message received.

Actions available

Send WhatsApp, send email, post Slack alert, update pipeline stage, wait N hours/days — chain any combination.

04 — Interest Score Matrix

Every Lead, Ranked by Intent

SalesAI scores every lead from 0 to 100 based on a multi-signal model that evaluates response speed, message sentiment, question type, engagement frequency, and conversation depth. The score updates in real time after every message exchange.

70–100

Green

High buying intent. AI prioritises these leads and triggers meeting booking. Reps receive Slack alerts.

40–69

Amber

Moderate interest. AI continues nurture sequence with targeted follow-ups and objection handling.

0–39

Red

Low engagement. AI maintains a light-touch cadence. Scores can recover as intent signals emerge.

Scoring Signals

SignalWeightExamples
Response speedHighReplies within 5 min (+15 pts), replies next day (0 pts), no reply (-10 pts)
Message sentimentHighEnthusiasm, urgency keywords, positive affirmations
Questions askedMediumSpecific questions about materials, timeline, warranty = high intent
Engagement depthMediumNumber of messages exchanged; longer threads = more invested
Contact completenessLowProvided phone, email, and company = serious buyer
Quote valueLowLarger quotes weighted slightly lower (longer sales cycle)

Configurable threshold: Your team sets the escalation threshold (default: 70). Leads that cross it trigger a Slack alert to the assigned rep and activate the meeting-booking workflow automatically.

05 — Pipeline & Analytics

Data-Driven Sales Management

The Analytics module gives managers a 30-day performance view across all channels and reps. Four headline KPIs surface immediately, followed by week-by-week lead volume and channel breakdown charts.

Conversion Rate

Percentage of leads that progress to “won” stage, with comparison to prior period.

AI Resolution Rate

Percentage of lead queries resolved by AI without rep intervention.

Channel Performance

WhatsApp vs. email vs. SMS — message volume and response rates side by side.

Calendar & Meeting Tracking

Every meeting booked by the AI appears on the shared calendar. Reps can track scheduled, completed, cancelled, and no-show statuses with a colour-coded monthly view.

06 — System Architecture

Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure

SalesAI is built as a modern, cloud-native application with clear separation between frontend, backend, and AI services. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. The system is stateless and horizontally scalable.

Security

JWT authentication, role-based access control, TLS 1.3 in transit, AES-256 at rest.

Scalability

Stateless API containers auto-scale behind a load balancer. Database read replicas for analytics queries.

Reliability

Multi-zone deployment, automated backups, 99.9% SLA. Job queue ensures no workflow step is dropped.

07 — Integration Guide

Connects to Your Existing Stack

SalesAI integrates with the tools your team already uses. Credentials are configured once at the account level — no per-rep setup required.

IntegrationUse CaseStatusSetup
WhatsApp Business API Primary AI conversation channel. Inbound and outbound messages. Available Meta Business account + API key
SendGrid (Email) Transactional email for AI follow-ups and notifications. Available SendGrid API key + domain verification
Google Calendar AI books meetings directly into reps’ calendars. Available OAuth 2.0 with Google Workspace
Slack Real-time alerts when a lead score crosses threshold. Available Slack App installation + webhook URL
Zapier / Make Connect SalesAI events to 1,000+ apps via webhook triggers. Q4 2026 Webhook URL configuration
Xero / MYOB Sync accepted quotes directly to your accounting software. Q4 2026 OAuth 2.0
Custom CRM Bidirectional sync via REST API with any CRM. On request API documentation provided

Knowledge Base for AI Context

The knowledge base is the AI’s reference library. Add articles for FAQs, pricing, materials, warranty terms, and processes. The AI uses retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to pull the most relevant articles into every response — ensuring accuracy and brand consistency.

08 — Implementation Roadmap

Live in 4 Weeks

SalesAI is designed for fast deployment. Most customers are fully operational and sending AI conversations within 4 weeks of contract signature. Here is the standard implementation timeline:

1
Week 1

Onboarding & Setup

Account provisioning, WhatsApp Business API approval, SendGrid domain verification, team user creation.

2
Week 2

Knowledge Base

Populate KB with your FAQs, pricing tiers, warranty docs, and process guides. AI persona configuration.

3
Week 3

Workflow Build

Configure lead import (CSV or API), build automation workflows, set escalation thresholds. UAT with your team.

4
Week 4

Go Live

Launch to production, parallel-run review, rep training session, 30-day hypercare support period begins.

Dedicated implementation manager assigned to every customer. Includes data migration from your existing spreadsheet or CRM, custom KB population from your documentation, and rep training (live and recorded).

10 — Next Steps

Ready to Get Started?

Getting from this proposal to your first AI conversation takes less than a week. Here is exactly what happens next:

1

Schedule a Live Demo

Book a 45-minute demo with our team. We will walk through the platform live, answer your technical questions, and show you a simulation using your own lead scenarios.

2

14-Day Free Trial

Start a fully featured trial with your own WhatsApp number and up to 50 live leads. No credit card required. Our implementation team will set it up for you.

3

Proposal & Contract

We will send a formal proposal tailored to your team size and lead volumes. Contracts are month-to-month with an option to lock in annual pricing for a discount.

4

Implementation & Go-Live

Your dedicated implementation manager handles everything — WhatsApp approval, knowledge base setup, workflow configuration, and rep training — within 4 weeks.
